overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a dystopian sci-fi game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a player walking through a military checkpoint during an orange-hued dust storm. The scene features armed guards in tactical gear, futuristic armored vehicles, concrete barriers, and industrial architecture under a hazy, polluted sky.

events.description: slowing approach toward the checkpoint guard standing in the center path

agents.ego_description: approaching the checkpoint barrier and the guard standing in the middle of the path

notable_agents.action: checkpoint guard standing with weapon ready, blocking the path
second guard standing near the barrier in the background

entered.detail: striped barrier with illuminated yellow lights spanning the street width
white and red striped concrete road barrier
white and red striped concrete road barrier
large dark industrial building with minimal windows visible through haze

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a military checkpoint in a dusty orange haze. A guard stands in the center path ahead of a yellow and black striped barrier with warning lights. Concrete dividers line the sides of the street, and industrial buildings loom in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: barricaded urban street with military vehicles

events.description: turning right to proceed past the checkpoint barrier down the barricaded street

agents.ego_description: turning right and proceeding past the checkpoint into the barricaded street section

notable_agents.action: checkpoint guard receding behind as the player moves past
futuristic armored personnel carrier parked on the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The player turns right to bypass the checkpoint, moving past the barrier into a wider street lined with concrete dividers. A large futuristic armored vehicle is parked on the right, and the industrial building remains visible through the orange haze ahead.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the barricaded street toward the distant overpass

notable_agents.action: guard standing near the industrial building facade on the left
armored personnel carrier with yellow markings and shark decal

entered.detail: large concrete bridge structure spanning the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The player continues walking down the street, passing concrete barriers and approaching a large concrete overpass in the distance. The armored vehicle is now closer on the right, and a guard stands near the industrial building on the left.

events.description: passing close to the armored vehicle temporarily blocking the right side view

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass and passing the armored vehicle on the right

notable_agents.action: futuristic APC being passed on the right side, revealing cargo containers behind
two guards in tactical gear standing near green shipping containers under the overpass

entered.detail: stacked green shipping containers under the overpass shelter

segments.scene_description: The player passes the armored vehicle and enters the sheltered area under the concrete overpass. Two guards stand near green shipping containers on the left. The lighting becomes darker under the overpass, and the orange haze is less intense here.

agents.ego_description: continuing past the underpass guards toward a group near an abandoned van

notable_agents.action: abandoned gray van with open doors under the overpass
guard standing near the abandoned van, observing the player

segments.scene_description: The player exits the underpass shelter, passing the guards and moving toward an abandoned van on the left. The orange haze returns as the player leaves the covered area, with the concrete overpass receding behind and industrial buildings visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a military checkpoint that transitions from an open, dust-choked street into the shadow of a concrete overpass before returning to the hazy exterior. It begins by approaching a guard stationed at a yellow and black striped barrier amidst a thick orange haze and towering industrial buildings. As the camera turns right to bypass the checkpoint, the view opens up to a wider street where a large futuristic armored vehicle looms on the right side of the concrete dividers. The scene then shifts as the camera moves past the vehicle and enters the sheltered darkness beneath a massive concrete overpass, where the orange glow fades and guards stand watch near green shipping containers. Finally, the camera exits the underpass and passes an abandoned van, with the intense orange haze returning as the industrial skyline reappears ahead.
